free_text: Angular alpha-gamma correlation analysis of the
mechanism of a-28Si scattering at Ea=25 MeV.
For scattered alpha particles six silicon
counters with NaI(Tl) crystals (60 mm thickness and
diameter) and FEU-82 photomultipliers were used.
Silicon plates with the thickness from 0.4 to 2
mg/cm2 with natural isotope abundance were used. For
angular correlation measurements mostly thick targets
No explanation of relative units is given.

COMMON section and values at ANG1 multiplied by -1.
ANG-SEC added. Part of data from Subent 005 added.
